notes: Minimal example instance demonstrating the four canonical prefixes. Matches the production instance byte-for-byte at x-version 1.0.0; future example bumps track production for consumer-side tests.

What this shows:.example: What this shows: rolling 63-day correlation between HY-IG OAS and SPY returns.

Why this matters:.example: Why this matters: spreads widen before equity drawdowns in 3 of 4 historical episodes.

How to read it:.example: How to read it: values above the dashed 0.5 line indicate the REDUCE regime.

Caveat:.when_to_use: Honest caution about sample or regime coverage.
Caveat:.example: Caveat: only one credit crisis in the OOS window.
